# meok-mcp-injection-scan-mcp
> Meok Mcp Injection Scan Mcp tools for AI agents. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install
```bash
pip install meok-mcp-injection-scan-mcp
```

## Auth
- Free tier: 5 calls/day per tool, no API key needed
- Pro tier: unlimited, set MEOK_API_KEY env var
- All tools are read-only and stateless

## Tools

### check_compliance
Run a meok-mcp-injection-scan-mcp compliance check.
- `target` (str, required): The system or dataset to check
- Returns: pass/fail, with detailed analysis
- Use when: Quick compliance check before deeper analysis

### audit_report
Generate a full meok-mcp-injection-scan-mcp audit report.
- `target` (str, required): The system or dataset to audit
- Returns: full report, citations, recommended fixes
- Use when: You need documentation for an external audit

## Pricing
- Free: 5 calls/day per tool
- Pro: $99/mo (unlimited)
- Enterprise: $499/mo (full audit + attestation)

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/meok-mcp-injection-scan-mcp
- MEOK: https://meok.ai
- CSOAI: https://csoai.org

Built by Nick Templeman and the MEOK AI Labs team.
